fields.lyrics:
Liverpool FC, Liverpool FC,
We are the greatest team in history...

James Milner, he runs all day...

fields.description: Chant for Dutch midfielder Ryan Gravenberch.

fields.title: Conor Bradley

fields.description: Chant for Northern Irish academy graduate Conor Bradley.

fields.title: Jarell Quansah
fields.lyrics: Jarell Quansah, he plays at the back...
fields.description: Chant for homegrown centre-back Jarell Quansah.

In Istanbul, he fulfilled the dream...
fields.description: Celebrating Gerrard's role in the 2005 Champions League final comeback.

fields.lyrics: We're Liverpool FC, we're going to win the Champions League...

fields.description: Rivalry chant sung toward Everton; part of Merseyside derby culture.

fields.lyrics: Poor little Everton, they haven't won a thing...
fields.description: Merseyside derby taunt referencing Everton's trophy drought.

fields.lyrics: You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore...
fields.description: Generic taunt often directed at Manchester United at Anfield.

fields.title: Chelsea Taunt (2005)
fields.lyrics: Cheer up lads, you'll never walk alone...
fields.description: Ironic taunt sung to Chelsea after Liverpool's 2005 semi-final victory.

fields.title: Fields of Athenry (Away Version)
fields.lyrics:
Low lie the fields of Anfield Road,
Where once we watched the great Bill Shankly...
fields.description: Away-end variant of the Fields of Athenry melody with Liverpool lyrics.

fields.description: Chant for German midfielder Emre Can during his Liverpool spell.

fields.lyrics:
Adam Lallana, he plays for Liverpool,
Adam Lallana, he plays for Liverpool...
fields.description: Chant for midfielder Adam Lallana in the Klopp era.

fields.title: Verde Listos
fields.lyrics:
Verde listos! Verde listos!
Austin FC, we're ready to go!
Verde listos! Verde listos!
Q2 Stadium, let the green flag flow!
fields.description: Austin FC's official motto chant — 'Green, Ready' — sung by supporters at Q2 Stadium.

fields.title: Verde Till I Die
fields.lyrics:
Verde till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Austin FC, till the day we die.
fields.description: Terrace pledge of lifelong support for the Verde and Black.

fields.title: We Are Austin
fields.lyrics:
We are Austin, super Austin,
We are Austin, from the capital city!
fields.description: Call-and-response chant celebrating Austin as Texas's capital.

fields.title: Austin FC Ole Ole Ole
fields.lyrics:
Ole, ole, ole ole! Ole, ole!
Austin FC, ole, ole!
fields.description: Victory chant adapted from the universal Ole Ole Ole.

fields.title: Verde Verde Verde
fields.lyrics:
Verde, verde, verde!
Austin FC! Austin FC!
Verde, verde, verde!

fields.title: Capital City Boys
fields.lyrics:
We're the capital city boys, making all the noise,
Austin FC, Austin FC, we're the capital city boys!
fields.description: Chant linking the club to Austin's status as capital of Texas.

fields.title: ATX Till I Die
fields.lyrics:
ATX till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Austin FC, till the day we die.
fields.description: Variant terrace song using the city's ATX abbreviation.

fields.title: Q2 Stadium Belongs to Us

Q2 Stadium belongs to us,
Q2 Stadium belongs to us,
Everywhere we go, the people want to know,
Who we are, so we tell them.
fields.description: Home end chant asserting Q2 Stadium as Austin FC territory.

fields.title: Listos Verdes
fields.lyrics:
Listos verdes, listos verdes,
Austin FC on the march again!
fields.description: Spanish-English hybrid chant using the club's green-ready identity.

fields.title: Keep Austin Verde
fields.lyrics:
Keep Austin verde, keep Austin verde,
Keep Austin verde, Austin FC!
fields.description: Play on Austin's 'Keep Austin Weird' slogan adapted for the club.

fields.title: Lone Star Greens
fields.lyrics:
Lone Star greens, Lone Star greens,
Austin FC, the finest team you've seen!
fields.description: Chant referencing Texas as the Lone Star State.

fields.title: March to Q2
fields.lyrics:
March to Q2, march to Q2,
Austin FC, we're marching through!
fields.description: Pre-match march chant as supporters head to the stadium.

fields.title: Austin FC Anthem
fields.lyrics:
Austin FC, the capital's team,
Verde and black is all we need,
From the Hill Country to the coast,
Austin FC, we love you most!
fields.description: Original-style fan anthem for the club.

fields.title: La La La Austin FC
fields.lyrics:
La la la la la, la la la la la,
La la la la la la la, Austin FC!
fields.description: Simple la-la-la terrace chant used during matches.

fields.title: Green and Black Army
fields.lyrics:
Green and black army, green and black army,
Austin FC, the green and black army!
fields.description: Terrace identity chant for the Verde and Black supporters.

fields.title: Over Land and Sea and ATX
fields.lyrics:
We all follow Austin FC, over land and sea and ATX,
We all follow Austin FC, on to victory!
fields.description: Away-support chant adapted from English terrace traditions.

fields.title: Verde on a Saturday
fields.lyrics:
Verde on a Saturday, we're going out today,
For a game of football with the Austin FC!
fields.description: Matchday terrace song for Saturday kickoffs.

fields.title: Austin FC We Love You
fields.lyrics:
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
Austin FC, we love you, we do,
And Q2 is our home!
fields.description: Simple love song for the club and stadium.

fields.title: Texas Soccer Town
fields.lyrics:
Austin, Texas, soccer town,
Verde and black we're world renowned!
fields.description: Chant positioning Austin as a growing American soccer city.

fields.title: Section Verde
fields.lyrics:
Section Verde, Section Verde,
Loudest section in the league!
fields.description: Chant for the loudest supporter sections at Q2 Stadium.

fields.title: Austin FC Allez Allez
fields.lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Austin FC, super Austin FC,
Allez, allez, allez!
fields.description: Adapted allez-allez chant popular across global soccer.

fields.title: Verde Wave
fields.lyrics:
Do the verde wave, do the verde wave,
Austin FC, Austin FC, do the verde wave!
fields.description: Stadium participation chant encouraging the wave.

fields.title: ATX FC On Tour
fields.lyrics:
ATX FC on tour, ATX FC on tour,
Everywhere we go, people want to know,
Who we are, where we come from.
fields.description: Away-day chant for travelling Austin FC supporters.

fields.title: Green Flag High
fields.lyrics:
Keep the green flag flying high, in the Texas sky,
Austin FC forever, till the day we die!
fields.description: Terrace song about flying the club's green flag.

fields.title: Sebastian Driussi Song
fields.lyrics:
Seba, Seba, Seba Driussi,
Austin FC number ten, he's the best you'll ever see!
fields.description: Player chant for Argentine forward Sebastian Driussi.

fields.title: Driussi Is His Name
fields.lyrics:
His name is Seba Driussi, he plays for Austin FC,
His name is Seba Driussi, he's better than Messi!
fields.description: Humorous player tribute comparing Driussi to Lionel Messi.

fields.title: Diego Fagundez Song
fields.lyrics:
Diego, Diego Fagundez, running down the wing,
Diego, Diego Fagundez, Austin FC king!
fields.description: Chant for longtime MLS winger Diego Fagundez.

fields.title: Alex Ring Song
fields.lyrics:
Alex Ring, Alex Ring, leading from the back,
Alex Ring, Alex Ring, captain of the pack!

fields.title: Rodrigo Bentancur Chant
fields.lyrics:
Bentancur, Bentancur, running through the middle,
Bentancur, Bentancur, Austin FC's riddle!

fields.title: Nick Lima Song

Nick Lima, Nick Lima, overlapping down the right,
Nick Lima, Nick Lima, green and black delight!

fields.title: Cascante in the Middle
fields.lyrics:
Cascante in the middle, Cascante in the middle,
Running the show, running the show!

fields.title: Brad Stuver Song

Brad Stuver, Brad Stuver, standing tall in goal,
Brad Stuver, Brad Stuver, keeping a clean sheet whole!

fields.title: Pochettino Chant

Pochettino, Pochettino, scoring for the green,

fields.title: Emiliano Rigoni Song

Rigoni, Rigoni, magic on the ball,
Rigoni, Rigoni, best of them all!

fields.title: Verde Goal Celebration
fields.lyrics:

Austin FC all across the nation!

fields.title: MLS Expansion Pride

Twenty twenty-one we arrived, Austin FC came alive,
MLS expansion, verde and black, we thrive!
fields.description: Chant referencing Austin FC's 2021 MLS expansion debut.

fields.title: First Match at Q2
fields.lyrics:
First match at Q2, history was made,
Verde and black, a new parade!
fields.description: Chant commemorating the inaugural match at Q2 Stadium.

fields.title: Playoffs Verde
fields.lyrics:
Playoffs verde, playoffs verde,
Austin FC marching on!
fields.description: Playoff push chant for late-season matches.

fields.title: Beat Houston
fields.lyrics:
Beat Houston, beat Houston, beat Houston today,
Texas derby, verde all the way!
fields.description: Texas derby chant against Houston Dynamo FC.

fields.title: Beat FC Dallas
fields.lyrics:
Beat Dallas, beat Dallas, beat Dallas today,
Copa Tejas on the line, verde all the way!

fields.title: Copa Tejas Champions
fields.lyrics:
Copa Tejas champions, Copa Tejas champions,
Austin FC, the best in Texas!

fields.title: Verde Night
fields.lyrics:
Verde night, verde night, everything's alright,
Austin FC under the Q2 lights!

fields.title: Jump Around Q2
fields.lyrics:
Jump around! Jump around! Jump around!
Austin FC, Q2 Stadium, jump around!

fields.lyrics:
Beat the drums, beat the drums, verde drums are here,
Austin FC supporters, loudest in the atmosphere!

fields.title: Austin FC Forever
fields.lyrics:
Austin FC forever, whatever the weather,
Verde and black together, now and forever!

fields.title: Green Smoke Rise

fields.title: Verde Away Days

fields.title: Chicago Fire Till I Die

Let your light shine, let your light shine,

fields.title: Chicago Fire Ole Ole Ole

Ole, ole, ole ole! Ole, ole!
Chicago Fire, ole, ole!

Fire away, fire away, Chicago Fire away,

fields.title: Chicago Fire Allez Allez

Allez, allez, allez,
We are Chicago Fire, super Chicago Fire,
Allez, allez, allez!

Ninety-eight we won it all, Chicago Fire standing tall,

Nineteen ninety-eight, we were great,
Chicago Fire, MLS Cup champions of the league!

Who we are, so we tell them.

fields.title: Chicago Fire Anthem
fields.lyrics:
Chicago Fire, burning bright,
Red and white through day and night,
From the lakefront to the west,
Chicago Fire, you're the best!

fields.title: Windy City Fire
fields.lyrics:
Windy City Fire, Windy City Fire,
Chicago Fire, taking us higher!

fields.title: Midwest Soccer Pride
fields.lyrics:

Chicago Fire, side by side!

fields.title: Polish Triangle Fire

fields.title: Over Land and Sea and Chicago
fields.lyrics:
We all follow Chicago Fire, over land and sea and Chicago,
We all follow Chicago Fire, on to victory!
fields.description: Away-support chant adapted from English terrace traditions.

fields.title: Chicago Fire We Love You
fields.lyrics:
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
Chicago Fire, we love you, we do,
And Soldier Field is our home!

fields.title: Red and White Army

Red and white army, red and white army,

fields.title: Fire on a Saturday
fields.lyrics:
Fire on a Saturday, we're going out today,
For a game of football with the Chicago Fire!

fields.title: La La La Chicago Fire
fields.lyrics:
La la la la la, la la la la la,
La la la la la la la, Chicago Fire!
fields.description: Simple la-la-la terrace chant used during matches.

fields.title: Cuauhtémoc Blanco Song
fields.lyrics:
Cuauhtémoc Blanco, magic on the pitch,
Cuauhtémoc Blanco, Chicago Fire's witch!

fields.title: Blanco La Ola
fields.lyrics:
Blanco, Blanco, running with the ball,
Blanco, Blanco, best of them all!
fields.description: Chant celebrating Cuauhtémoc Blanco's flair at Chicago Fire.

fields.title: Hristo Stoichkov Song
fields.lyrics:
Hristo, Hristo Stoichkov, Bulgarian king,
Hristo, Hristo Stoichkov, hear the Fire sing!
fields.description: Tribute to Bulgarian legend Hristo Stoichkov.

fields.title: Bastian Schweinsteiger Chant
fields.lyrics:
Schweinsteiger, Schweinsteiger, World Cup winner here,
Schweinsteiger, Schweinsteiger, Fire legend we revere!
fields.description: Chant for German World Cup winner Bastian Schweinsteiger.

fields.title: Brian McBride Song
fields.lyrics:
McBride, McBride, heading in the goal,
McBride, McBride, Fire in his soul!
fields.description: Tribute to American legend and former captain Brian McBride.

fields.title: Chris Armas Chant
fields.lyrics:
Chris Armas, Chris Armas, engine of the team,
Chris Armas, Chris Armas, Fire's midfield dream!
fields.description: Player tribute for former midfielder Chris Armas.

fields.title: CJ Sapong Song
fields.lyrics:
Sapong, Sapong, scoring for the Fire,
Sapong, Sapong, taking us higher!
fields.description: Chant for forward CJ Sapong.

fields.title: Xherdan Shaqiri Chant
fields.lyrics:
Shaqiri, Shaqiri, left foot like a whip,
Shaqiri, Shaqiri, Chicago Fire's chip!
fields.description: Player tribute for Swiss star Xherdan Shaqiri.

fields.title: Chris Mueller Song
fields.lyrics:
Mueller, Mueller, running down the wing,
Mueller, Mueller, hear the Fire sing!
fields.description: Chant for winger Chris Mueller.

fields.title: Gabriel Slonina Chant
fields.lyrics:
Slonina, Slonina, standing in the goal,
Slonina, Slonina, Chicago Fire's soul!
fields.description: Goalkeeper tribute for Gabriel Slonina.

fields.title: Fire Goal Celebration
fields.lyrics:
Score a goal, fire celebration,
Chicago Fire all across the nation!
fields.description: Post-goal terrace chant.

fields.title: Beat the Crew
fields.lyrics:
Beat the Crew, beat the Crew, beat the Crew today,
Hell is real, but the Fire's here to stay!
fields.description: Rivalry chant against Columbus Crew.

fields.title: Beat Sporting KC
fields.lyrics:
Beat Sporting, beat Sporting, beat Sporting today,
Heartland rivalry, Fire all the way!
fields.description: Rivalry chant against Sporting Kansas City.

fields.title: Beat St Louis City
fields.lyrics:
Beat St Louis, beat St Louis, beat St Louis today,
Midwest derby, Fire all the way!

fields.title: Playoffs Fire
fields.lyrics:
Playoffs fire, playoffs fire,
Chicago Fire marching on!

fields.title: Fire Drums
fields.lyrics:
Beat the drums, beat the drums, Fire drums are here,
Chicago Fire supporters, loudest in the atmosphere!

fields.title: Smoke and Flares
fields.lyrics:
Smoke and flares, smoke and flares,
Chicago Fire filling the air!

fields.title: Fire Away Days
fields.lyrics:
Fire away days, Fire away days,
Following Chicago every mile!
fields.description: Dedicated travelling supporters chant.

fields.title: I Will Follow You Into the Fire
fields.lyrics:
I will follow you into the Fire,
I will follow you into the Fire,
Chicago Fire, wherever you go!
fields.description: Terrace song play on the club name inspired by supporter culture.

fields.title: Chicago Till I Die
fields.lyrics:
Chicago till I die, on this I do rely,
We will love you Chicago Fire, till the day we die.
fields.description: City-focused variant of the till-I-die pledge.

fields.title: Original 10 Pride
fields.lyrics:
Original ten pride, original ten pride,
Chicago Fire, MLS since ninety-five!
fields.description: Chant celebrating the Fire as one of MLS's original ten clubs.

fields.title: Lamar Hunt Open Cup
fields.lyrics:
Open Cup champions, Open Cup champions,
Chicago Fire, trophy hunters!
fields.description: Chant celebrating multiple US Open Cup wins.

fields.title: Fire Night
fields.lyrics:
Fire night, fire night, everything's alright,
Chicago Fire under the Soldier Field lights!
fields.description: Evening kickoff atmosphere chant.

fields.title: Jump Around Soldier Field
fields.lyrics:
Jump around! Jump around! Jump around!
Chicago Fire, Soldier Field, jump around!
fields.description: Stadium hype chant inspired by jump-around traditions.

fields.title: Chicago Fire Forever
fields.lyrics:
Chicago Fire forever, whatever the weather,
Red and white together, now and forever!
fields.description: Closing terrace song affirming long-term loyalty.

fields.title: Fuego Fuego
fields.lyrics:
Fuego, fuego, Chicago Fire fuego,
Fuego, fuego, burning through the league-o!
fields.description: Bilingual fire-themed terrace chant.

fields.title: Lakefront to the Loop
fields.lyrics:
From the lakefront to the Loop,
Chicago Fire, we follow you!
fields.description: Geographic chant referencing Chicago neighborhoods.

fields.title: One Nil to the Arsenal
fields.lyrics:
One nil to the Arsenal, one nil to the Arsenal,
One nil to the Arsenal, one nil to the Arsenal.
fields.description: Iconic terrace chant sung to the tune of Go West; celebrates Arsenal's reputation for 1-0 wins.

fields.title: We Are the Gooners
fields.lyrics:
We are the Gooners, the mighty mighty Gooners,
We are the Gooners, from Highbury.
fields.description: Core identity chant for Arsenal supporters, referencing the Gooner nickname and old ground.

fields.title: North London Forever
fields.lyrics:
North London forever, whatever the weather,
These colours must never fade,
No matter the reason, no matter the season,
These colours must never fade.

fields.title: Victoria Concordia Crescit

Victoria Concordia Crescit,
Victory through harmony.

fields.title: 49 Unbeaten

Forty-nine, forty-nine unbeaten,
Forty-nine, forty-nine unbeaten,
We won the league without losing.

fields.title: The Invincibles
fields.lyrics:
We are the Invincibles, the mighty mighty Invincibles,
We are the Invincibles, from Highbury.

fields.title: Thierry Henry Is His Name

His name is Thierry Henry, Thierry Henry,
His name is Thierry Henry, he plays for Arsenal.

fields.title: Thierry Henry (Va Va Voom)
fields.lyrics:
Thierry Henry, Thierry Henry, Thierry Henry,
Va va voom, va va voom.

fields.title: Dennis Bergkamp
fields.lyrics:
Dennis Bergkamp, Dennis Bergkamp, Dennis Bergkamp,
Number ten, number ten.
fields.description: Tribute to Dutch forward Dennis Bergkamp, one of Arsenal's greatest ever players.

fields.title: There's Only One Tony Adams
fields.lyrics:
There's only one Tony Adams, one Tony Adams,
There's only one Tony Adams.
fields.description: Terrace chant for captain Tony Adams, leader of the famous back four.

fields.title: Ian Wright
fields.lyrics:
Wrighty, Wrighty, Wrighty, Wrighty,
Ian Wright, Ian Wright.
fields.description: Kop-end style chant for striker Ian Wright, Arsenal legend and club record holder before Henry.

fields.title: Patrick Vieira
fields.lyrics:
Vieira, Vieira, Vieira, Vieira,
Patrick Vieira, Patrick Vieira.
fields.description: Midfield general chant for Patrick Vieira, captain of the Wenger era's greatest teams.

fields.title: Bukayo Saka
fields.lyrics:
Bukayo Saka, he plays on the right,
Bukayo Saka, his future's looking bright.
fields.description: Modern homegrown hero chant for Bukayo Saka, academy graduate and England star.

fields.title: Martin Odegaard
fields.lyrics:
Martin Odegaard, he's our Norwegian prince,
Martin Odegaard, he plays for Arsenal.
fields.description: Chant for captain Martin Odegaard, Arsenal's creative midfield leader.

fields.title: Declan Rice
fields.lyrics:
Declan Rice, Declan Rice, Declan Rice,
He sits in midfield, he sits in midfield.
fields.description: Terrace song for England midfielder Declan Rice, signed from West Ham in 2023.

fields.title: There's Only One Arsene Wenger
fields.lyrics:
There's only one Arsene Wenger, one Arsene Wenger,
There's only one Arsene Wenger.
fields.description: Tribute to legendary manager Arsene Wenger, who managed Arsenal for 22 years.

fields.title: Arsene Wenger (One Arsene Wenger)
fields.lyrics:
One Arsene Wenger, there's only one Arsene Wenger,
One Arsene Wenger, there's only one Arsene Wenger.
fields.description: Alternative Wenger chant sung during his long reign at Highbury and the Emirates.

fields.title: What Do You Think of Tottenham?
fields.lyrics:
What do you think of Tottenham? Shit!
What do you think of Tottenham? Shit!
What do you think of Tottenham? Shit!
What do you think of Tottenham? Shit!
fields.description: Classic North London derby call-and-response chant directed at Tottenham Hotspur.

fields.title: Stand Up If You Love the Arsenal
fields.lyrics:
Stand up if you love the Arsenal,
Stand up if you love the Arsenal.
fields.description: Simple terrace call chant used to rouse the home support at the Emirates.

fields.title: Arsenal Till I Die
fields.lyrics:
Arsenal till I die, I know I am,
I'm Arsenal till I die, I know I am, I know I am.
fields.description: Loyalty chant sung to the tune of Bread of Heaven, declaring lifelong support.

fields.title: Over Land and Sea and Tottenham
fields.lyrics:
We all follow Arsenal, over land and sea and Tottenham,
We all follow Arsenal, on to victory.
fields.description: Core support chant declaring allegiance home, away, and over local rivals.

fields.title: We Hate Tottenham
fields.lyrics:
We hate Tottenham, we hate Tottenham,
We hate Tottenham, and we hate Tottenham.
fields.description: North London derby chant expressing the long-standing rivalry with Spurs.

fields.title: Where's Your European Cup?
fields.lyrics:
Where's your European Cup? Where's your European Cup?
Where's your European Cup? Where's your European Cup?
fields.description: Derby taunt referencing Tottenham's lack of a European Cup/Champions League title.

fields.title: Highbury
fields.lyrics:
Highbury, Highbury, Highbury,
We will never forget you.
fields.description: Nostalgic chant for Arsenal's former home, Highbury, closed in 2006.

fields.title: The Clock End
fields.lyrics:
The Clock End, the Clock End, the Clock End,
We are the Clock End army.
fields.description: Chant referencing the famous Clock End stand at Highbury, now echoed at the Emirates.

fields.title: North Bank
fields.lyrics:
North Bank, la la la la la,
North Bank, la la la la la.
fields.description: Chant for the North Bank, the vocal heart of the Highbury and Emirates support.

fields.title: Emirates Stadium
fields.lyrics:
This is the Emirates, this is the Emirates,
No one wants to be here.
fields.description: Chant referencing the Emirates Stadium, parodying the intimidating home atmosphere.

fields.title: We Love You Arsenal
fields.lyrics:
We love you Arsenal, we do,
We love you Arsenal, we do,
We love you Arsenal, we do,
And the North Bank loves you too.
fields.description: Simple terrace song affirming support for the club and the North Bank faithful.

fields.title: She Wears a Red and White Shirt
fields.lyrics:
She wears a red and white shirt, red and white shirt,
Red and white shirt, she wears a red and white shirt,
And she knows her Arsenal.
fields.description: Terrace song celebrating female Arsenal supporters and club colours.

fields.title: Keep the Faith
fields.lyrics:
Keep the faith, keep the faith, keep the faith,
We are Arsenal.
fields.description: Encouraging chant sung during difficult periods, urging supporters to stay loyal.

fields.title: We're the North London Side
fields.lyrics:
We're the North London side, the Emirates side,
We're the North London side, the Emirates side.
fields.description: Identity chant asserting Arsenal's North London roots at the Emirates Stadium.

fields.title: Robert Pires
fields.lyrics:
Robert Pires, Robert Pires, Robert Pires,
Running down the wing.
fields.description: Tribute to French winger Robert Pires, key member of the Invincibles.

fields.title: Freddie Ljungberg
fields.lyrics:
Freddie Ljungberg, he wears red hair,
Freddie Ljungberg, he plays for Arsenal.
fields.description: Chant for Swedish winger Freddie Ljungberg, known for his distinctive red hair.

fields.title: Sol Campbell
fields.lyrics:
Sol Campbell, Sol Campbell, Sol Campbell,
He left Tottenham for Arsenal.
fields.description: Controversial tribute to Sol Campbell, who crossed the North London divide in 2001.

fields.title: David Seaman
fields.lyrics:
David Seaman, David Seaman, David Seaman,
The best goalkeeper in the land.
fields.description: Chant for goalkeeper David Seaman, Arsenal's number one through the 1990s and early 2000s.

fields.title: Lee Dixon
fields.lyrics:
Lee Dixon, Lee Dixon, Lee Dixon,
Right-back, right-back.
fields.description: Tribute to full-back Lee Dixon, part of Arsenal's famous defensive unit.

fields.title: Nigel Winterburn
fields.lyrics:
Nigel Winterburn, Nigel Winterburn,
Left-back, left-back.
fields.description: Chant for left-back Nigel Winterburn, a mainstay of the Wenger revolution.

fields.title: Ray Parlour
fields.lyrics:
Ray Parlour, Ray Parlour, Ray Parlour,
The Romford Pele.
fields.description: Tribute to midfielder Ray Parlour, nicknamed the Romford Pele for his work rate.

fields.title: Robin van Persie
fields.lyrics:
Robin van Persie, he scores the goals,
Robin van Persie, he plays for Arsenal.
fields.description: Chant for Dutch striker Robin van Persie during his prolific Arsenal years.

fields.title: Cesc Fabregas
fields.lyrics:
Cesc Fabregas, he plays in midfield,
Cesc Fabregas, he plays for Arsenal.
fields.description: Tribute to Spanish midfielder Cesc Fabregas, academy graduate and future captain.

fields.title: Jack Wilshere
fields.lyrics:
Jack Wilshere, Jack Wilshere, Jack Wilshere,
He's one of our own.
fields.description: Homegrown midfielder chant for Jack Wilshere, Hale End academy product.

fields.title: Alexis Sanchez
fields.lyrics:
Alexis Sanchez, he plays on the left,
Alexis Sanchez, he's the best.
fields.description: Chant for Chilean forward Alexis Sanchez during his prolific 2014-2018 spell.

fields.title: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang
fields.lyrics:
Aubameyang, Aubameyang, Aubameyang,
He scores the goals.
fields.description: Terrace song for striker Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang, Golden Boot winner.

fields.title: Gabriel Jesus
fields.lyrics:
Gabriel Jesus, he plays for Arsenal,
Gabriel Jesus, he scores the goals.
fields.description: Chant for Brazilian striker Gabriel Jesus, signed from Manchester City.

fields.title: Gabriel Magalhaes
fields.lyrics:
Gabriel, Gabriel, Gabriel Magalhaes,
He plays at the back.
fields.description: Chant for Brazilian centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes.

fields.title: William Saliba
fields.lyrics:
William Saliba, he plays at the back,
William Saliba, he's the best in France.
fields.description: Tribute to French centre-back William Saliba, Hale End graduate.

fields.title: Kai Havertz
fields.lyrics:
Kai Havertz, he plays for Arsenal,
Kai Havertz, he scores the goals.
fields.description: Chant for German forward Kai Havertz, signed from Chelsea in 2023.

fields.title: Mikel Arteta Chant
fields.lyrics:
Mikel Arteta, he leads the team,
Mikel Arteta, he plays the Arsenal way.
fields.description: Chant for manager Mikel Arteta, former captain and Invincibles midfielder.

fields.title: Double Winners 1971
fields.lyrics:
Nineteen seventy-one, we won the Double,
Nineteen seventy-one, we won the Double.
fields.description: Chant celebrating Arsenal's first league and FA Cup double in 1970-71.

fields.title: FA Cup Kings
fields.lyrics:
Fourteen times we've won the FA Cup,
Fourteen times we've won the FA Cup.
fields.description: Chant celebrating Arsenal's record FA Cup haul.

fields.title: Wenger Out (Irony)
fields.lyrics:
We want Wenger out, we want Wenger out,
We want Wenger out, and then we want him back.
fields.description: Ironic terrace song from the later Wenger years, sung affectionately by supporters.

fields.title: Fields of Highbury
fields.lyrics:
Low lie the fields of Highbury,
Where once we watched the great Arsene Wenger.
fields.description: Fan song sung to the tune of Fields of Athenry, nostalgic for the old ground.

fields.title: Allez Allez Allez (Arsenal)
fields.lyrics:
Allez, allez, allez,
We are Arsenal, super Arsenal,
Allez, allez, allez.
fields.description: European-style terrace chant adopted by Arsenal fans during European campaigns.

fields.title: United Road
fields.lyrics:
United Road take me home,
To the place I belong,
To Old Trafford, to see United,
United Road take me home.
fields.description: Fan song sung to the tune of Country Roads, celebrating the journey to Old Trafford.

fields.title: Sit Down Sit Down
fields.lyrics:
If you hate Man United stand up,
If you hate Man United stand up,
If you hate Man United, if you hate Man United,
If you hate Man United stand up.
fields.description: Terrace baiting chant sung to the tune of Blue Moon; invites rival fans to stand if they hate United.

fields.title: 20 Times Champions
fields.lyrics:
20 times, 20 times, Man United,
20 times I tell you, 20 times,
20 times, 20 times, Man United,
We've won the League 20 times.
fields.description: Chant celebrating Manchester United's record 20 English league titles.

fields.title: Theatre of Dreams
fields.lyrics:
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
This is the Theatre of Dreams,
And we're gonna win today.
fields.description: Chant referencing Old Trafford's famous nickname, coined by Bobby Charlton.

fields.title: Stretford End
fields.lyrics:
We're the Stretford End,
We're the Stretford End,
We're the Stretford End,
And we're gonna sing our song.
fields.description: Chant from the Stretford End, United's historic home terrace at Old Trafford.

fields.title: We Are the Red Devils
fields.lyrics:
We are the Red Devils,
Mighty, mighty Red Devils,
We are the Red Devils,
And we follow United.
fields.description: Terrace identity chant for Manchester United's Red Devils nickname.

fields.title: Manchester Is Red
fields.lyrics:
Manchester is red, Manchester is red,
We hate City, we hate Liverpool,
Manchester is red.
fields.description: Chant asserting United's dominance in Manchester and rivalry with City and Liverpool.

fields.title: George Best (The Belfast Boy)
fields.lyrics:
Georgie Best, Georgie Best,
The Belfast Boy,
Georgie Best, Georgie Best,
The greatest of them all.
fields.description: Tribute to George Best, United's dazzling 1960s winger and Ballon d'Or winner.

fields.title: Ooh Aah Cantona
fields.lyrics:
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona,
Ooh aah Cantona.
fields.description: Iconic Eric Cantona chant from the 1990s; one of United's most enduring terrace songs.

fields.title: Ryan Giggs Will Tear You Apart
fields.lyrics:
Ryan Giggs, Ryan Giggs,
Will tear you apart again.
fields.description: Chant for Ryan Giggs sung to the tune of Joy Division's Love Will Tear Us Apart.

fields.title: Paul Scholes From Fifty Yards
fields.lyrics:
Paul Scholes, he'll score you goals,
Paul Scholes, from 50 yards.
fields.description: Terrace tribute celebrating Paul Scholes's long-range shooting and midfield mastery.

fields.title: David Beckham
fields.lyrics:
Posh and Becks, Posh and Becks,
David Beckham, he's the best,
Posh and Becks, Posh and Becks,
David Beckham, he's the best.
fields.description: 1990s chant for David Beckham, United's iconic right midfielder and free-kick specialist.

fields.title: Wayne Rooney (Running Down the Wing)
fields.lyrics:
Rooney, Rooney,
Running down the wing,
Rooney, Rooney,
Running down the wing.
fields.description: Terrace song for Wayne Rooney, United's record goalscorer.

fields.title: Viva Ronaldo
fields.lyrics:
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo,
Viva Ronaldo.
fields.description: Chant for Cristiano Ronaldo during his first spell at Old Trafford (2003-2009).

fields.title: Stand Up If You Love Roy Keane
fields.lyrics:
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up if you love Roy Keane,
Stand up, stand up.
fields.description: Call-and-response tribute to captain Roy Keane, the heart of United's midfield dynasty.

fields.title: Sir Alex Ferguson
fields.lyrics:
There's only one Alex Ferguson,
One Alex Ferguson,
There's only one Alex Ferguson.
fields.description: Tribute to Sir Alex Ferguson, manager of United's 26-year trophy-laden era.

fields.title: Marcus Rashford
fields.lyrics:
Rashford, la la la la la la la,
Rashford, la la la la la la la,
If he's good enough for you, he's good enough for me,
If he scores another few, then I'll be Mancunian too.
fields.description: Modern terrace chant for Marcus Rashford, adapted from the Mo Salah melody.

fields.title: Bruno Fernandes
fields.lyrics:
Bruno, Bruno, Bruno Fernandes,
From Sporting to United,
Bruno, Bruno, Bruno Fernandes,
He's our Portuguese jewel.
fields.description: Chant for Bruno Fernandes, United's creative midfield talisman since 2020.

fields.title: 1999 Treble
fields.lyrics:
We've won the treble,
We've won the treble,
Manchester United,
We've won the treble.
fields.description: Celebration chant for United's historic 1998-99 treble of Premier League, FA Cup, and Champions League.

fields.title: One Nil to United (Solskjaer)
fields.lyrics:
One nil to United, one nil to United,
Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, one nil to United.
fields.description: Chant immortalising Ole Gunnar Solskjaer's injury-time winner in the 1999 Champions League final.

fields.title: Manchester City Taunt (Blue Moon)
fields.lyrics:
Blue Moon, you saw me standing alone,
Without a dream in my heart,
Without a trophy of my own.
fields.description: Rivalry taunt sung to Manchester City's Blue Moon anthem, mocking their trophy drought.

fields.title: Bertie's Got a City
fields.lyrics:
Bertie's got a City, City, City,
Bertie's got a City on his head.
fields.description: Classic Manchester derby taunt referencing City's perceived inferiority to United.

fields.title: Going Down Liverpool
fields.lyrics:
Going down, going down, so are Liverpool,
Going down, going down, so are Liverpool,
If you hate Liverpool, clap your hands.
fields.description: Rivalry chant directed at Liverpool, often sung during title races or relegation battles.

fields.title: Arsenal Taunt (What Were You Thinking)
fields.lyrics:
What were you thinking, what were you thinking,
Signing Emmanuel Adebayor?
fields.description: Banter chant aimed at Arsenal, referencing Adebayor's move to Manchester City.

fields.title: Leeds United Taunt
fields.lyrics:
We all hate Leeds Scum, we all hate Leeds Scum,
We all hate Leeds Scum.
fields.description: Rivalry chant against Leeds United, one of English football's fiercest historic rivalries.

fields.title: We're Man United Sing What We Want
fields.lyrics:
We're Man United, we'll sing what we want,
We're Man United, we'll sing what we want.
fields.description: Defiant away-end chant asserting United fans' right to sing anywhere.

fields.title: You're Not Singing Anymore
fields.lyrics:
You're not singing anymore, you're not singing anymore,
Your team's going home, your team's going home.
fields.description: Generic terrace taunt used by United fans when silencing opposition supporters.

fields.title: Bobby Charlton
fields.lyrics:
Bobby Charlton, Bobby Charlton,
The greatest Red of all,
Bobby Charlton, Bobby Charlton,
He never took a fall.
fields.description: Tribute to Sir Bobby Charlton, 1968 European Cup winner and England World Cup hero.

fields.title: Bryan Robson (Captain Marvel)
fields.lyrics:
Captain Marvel, Captain Marvel,
Bryan Robson, Captain Marvel.
fields.description: Chant for Bryan Robson, United's inspirational captain through the 1980s and early 1990s.

fields.title: Denis Law (The King)
fields.lyrics:
Denis Law, Denis Law,
The King of Old Trafford,
Denis Law, Denis Law,
The King of Old Trafford.
fields.description: Tribute to Denis Law, the Lawman, one of United's greatest strikers of the 1960s.

fields.title: Ole Gunnar Solskjaer (Baby-Faced Assassin)
fields.lyrics:
Ole, Ole, Ole Gunnar Solskjaer,
Ole, Ole, Ole Gunnar Solskjaer.
fields.description: Celebratory chant for Ole Gunnar Solskjaer, super-sub and 1999 Champions League hero.

fields.title: Peter Schmeichel
fields.lyrics:
Schmeichel, Schmeichel,
Standing on the wall,
Schmeichel, Schmeichel,
He's the best of all.
fields.description: Tribute to Peter Schmeichel, United's legendary Danish goalkeeper of the 1990s dynasty.

fields.title: Rio Ferdinand
fields.lyrics:
Rio Ferdinand, he plays at the back,
Rio Ferdinand, he's the best in the land.
fields.description: Chant for Rio Ferdinand, commanding centre-back of the Ferguson era.

fields.title: Nemanja Vidic
fields.lyrics:
Vidic, Vidic, Nemanja Vidic,
Vidic, Vidic, he'll break your legs.
fields.description: Terrace tribute to Nemanja Vidic, United's fearsome Serbian centre-back.

fields.title: Rio and Vida (Defence Partnership)
fields.lyrics:
Rio and Vida, Rio and Vida,
Rio and Vida, the best in the land.
fields.description: Chant celebrating the Rio Ferdinand and Nemanja Vidic centre-back partnership.

fields.title: Patrice Evra
fields.lyrics:
Patrice Evra, he plays left-back,
Patrice Evra, he plays for United.
fields.description: Chant for French left-back Patrice Evra, a key member of multiple title-winning sides.

fields.title: Park Ji-sung
fields.lyrics:
Park Ji-sung, he runs all day,
Park Ji-sung, he runs all day.
fields.description: Tribute to Park Ji-sung, the tireless South Korean midfielder beloved at Old Trafford.

fields.title: Edwin van der Sar
fields.lyrics:
Edwin van der Sar, the goalkeeper,
Edwin van der Sar, the best in the world.
fields.description: Chant for Dutch goalkeeper Edwin van der Sar, United's No. 1 from 2005 to 2011.

fields.title: Dwight Yorke
fields.lyrics:
Dwight Yorke, he scores the goals,
Dwight Yorke, he plays for United.
fields.description: Tribute to Dwight Yorke, prolific striker and key figure in the 1999 treble season.

fields.title: Faith in Youth
fields.lyrics:
Faith, faith in youth,
United have got faith in youth,
Faith, faith in youth,
United have got faith in youth.
fields.description: Chant celebrating United's tradition of developing young players through the academy.

fields.title: The Busby Babes
fields.lyrics:
The Busby Babes were glorious,
The Busby Babes were glorious,
The Busby Babes were glorious,
And they never will be forgotten.
fields.description: Remembrance chant for the Busby Babes, United's young team tragically lost in the 1958 Munich air disaster.

fields.title: Flowers of Manchester
fields.lyrics:
The flowers of Manchester lay sleeping,
In the cold, dark earth, in the rain,
And the flowers of Manchester united,
Will bloom and bloom again.
fields.description: Solemn song commemorating the Munich air disaster of 6 February 1958.

fields.title: Three European Cups
fields.lyrics:
We've won it three times, we've won it three times,
Manchester United, we've won it three times.
fields.description: Chant celebrating United's three European Cup/Champions League titles before 2008.

fields.title: Champions of Europe (1968)
fields.lyrics:
Champions of Europe, champions of Europe,
Manchester United, champions of Europe.
fields.description: Celebration of United's first European Cup triumph at Wembley in 1968 under Matt Busby.

fields.title: Follow Follow Man United
fields.lyrics:
Follow, follow, follow,
Follow Man United,
Follow, follow, follow,
On to victory.
fields.description: Core call-and-response chant declaring support for United home and away.

fields.title: Come On You Reds
fields.lyrics:
Come on you Reds, come on you Reds,
Come on you Reds, come on you Reds.
fields.description: Simple repetitive terrace chant urging United on during matches.

fields.title: We Love United
fields.lyrics:
We love United, we do,
Oh United we love you, we do,
Oh United we love you, we do,
And we follow United through and through.
fields.description: Terrace song affirming lifelong support for Manchester United.

fields.title: Old Trafford Bound
fields.lyrics:
We're going up to Old Trafford,
We're going up to Old Trafford,
We're going up to Old Trafford,
To see United win.
fields.description: Matchday chant sung by fans heading to the Theatre of Dreams.

fields.title: Everywhere We Go
fields.lyrics:
Everywhere we go,
People want to know,
Who we are,
So we tell them,
We are United, mighty mighty United.
fields.description: Away-day chant introducing United's travelling support to rival grounds.

fields.title: Blue is the Colour
fields.lyrics:
Blue is the colour, football is the game,
We're all together and winning is our aim,
So cheer us on through the sun and rain,
'Cause Chelsea, Chelsea is our name.
So cheer us on through the sun and rain,
'Cause Chelsea, Chelsea is our name.
fields.description: Official Chelsea club song written by Daniel O'Donnell; played before home matches at Stamford Bridge.

fields.title: Keep the Blue Flag Flying High
fields.lyrics:
Keep the blue flag flying high,
High up in the sky,
Keep the blue flag flying high,
For Chelsea, for Chelsea.
fields.description: Classic Chelsea terrace song celebrating the club's blue colours and identity.

fields.title: We All Follow Chelsea
fields.lyrics:
We all follow Chelsea,
Over land and sea and Leicester,
We all follow Chelsea,
On to victory.
fields.description: Core Chelsea call-and-response chant declaring support home and away.

fields.title: London is Blue
fields.lyrics:
London is blue, London is blue,
Tottenham Hotspur, you're in Division Two,
Oh London is blue, London is blue,
Arsenal go to pieces, QPR are shite.
fields.description: Terrace song asserting Chelsea's dominance in London and taunting local rivals.

fields.title: Chelsea Chelsea
fields.lyrics:
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea,
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea.
fields.description: Simple repetitive call chant used throughout Stamford Bridge.

fields.title: We Are Chelsea, Tra La La
fields.lyrics:
We are Chelsea, tra la la la la,
We are Chelsea, tra la la la la la la la.
fields.description: Simple call-and-response chant used around the ground.

fields.title: This Is Stamford Bridge
fields.lyrics:
This is Stamford Bridge,
This is Stamford Bridge,
No one wants to be here.
fields.description: Chant referencing Chelsea's home ground, echoing the famous Anfield tunnel sign.

fields.title: Stamford Bridge Is Falling Down
fields.lyrics:
Stamford Bridge is falling down, falling down, falling down,
Stamford Bridge is falling down, my fair lady.
fields.description: Terrace adaptation of the nursery rhyme, sung during big home nights.

fields.title: Shed End Chant
fields.lyrics:
We're the Shed End boys, we're the Shed End boys,
We're the Shed End boys, and we're going to make a noise.
fields.description: Chant from the historic Shed End stand, Chelsea's traditional home end.

fields.title: We'll Never Be Mastered
fields.lyrics:
We'll never be mastered, never be mastered,
We'll never be mastered by you.
fields.description: Defiant terrace chant sung by Chelsea supporters home and away.

fields.title: One Club One Flag
fields.lyrics:
One club, one flag, one dream,
Chelsea, Chelsea, Chelsea.
fields.description: Modern identity chant celebrating unity among Chelsea supporters.

fields.title: The Special One
fields.lyrics:
The Special One, la la la la la,
The Special One, la la la la la la la.
fields.description: Chant referencing Mourinho's famous 'Special One' self-description at his Chelsea unveiling.

fields.title: Antonio Conte Chant
fields.lyrics:
Antonio Conte, la la la la la,
Antonio Conte, he leads the Blues.
fields.description: Tribute to Antonio Conte, who won the Premier League in his first season at Chelsea (2016-17).

fields.title: Thomas Tuchel Chant
fields.lyrics:
Thomas Tuchel, he leads the Blues,
Thomas Tuchel, he leads the Blues.
fields.description: Chant for Thomas Tuchel, Chelsea manager during the 2021 Champions League triumph.

fields.title: Gianfranco Zola
fields.lyrics:
There's only one Gianfranco Zola, one Gianfranco Zola,
There's only one Gianfranco Zola.
fields.description: Tribute to Gianfranco Zola, beloved Chelsea forward and later assistant manager.

fields.title: Didier Drogba Is His Name
fields.lyrics:
His name is Didier Drogba, he plays for Chelsea,
He scores the goals, he makes the Shed End sing,
He plays on the left, he plays on the right,
That boy Drogba makes defenders look shite.
fields.description: Terrace tribute to Didier Drogba, Chelsea's greatest big-game striker.

fields.title: Drogba La La La
fields.lyrics:
Drogba, la la la la la la,
Didier Drogba, la la la la la la.
fields.description: Simple melody chant for Didier Drogba during his two Chelsea spells.

fields.title: Super Frank Lampard
fields.lyrics:
Super Frank Lampard, la la la la la,
Super Frank Lampard, la la la la la la la.
fields.description: Iconic chant for Frank Lampard, Chelsea's all-time leading goalscorer from midfield.

fields.title: There's Only One Frank Lampard
fields.lyrics:
There's only one Frank Lampard, one Frank Lampard,
There's only one Frank Lampard.
fields.description: Call-and-response tribute to Frank Lampard, later Chelsea manager.

fields.title: John Terry Leader of the Blues
fields.lyrics:
John Terry, leader of the Blues,
John Terry, leader of the Blues.
fields.description: Shed End chant honouring John Terry's captaincy and Chelsea loyalty.

fields.title: There's Only One John Terry
fields.lyrics:
There's only one John Terry, one John Terry,
There's only one John Terry.
fields.description: Direct terrace tribute to defender and captain John Terry.

fields.title: Eden Hazard Chant
fields.lyrics:
Hazard, Hazard, Hazard Hazard Hazard,
Eden Hazard, Hazard Hazard Hazard.
fields.description: Repetitive chant for Eden Hazard, Chelsea's talisman during the 2010s.

fields.title: Hazard La La La
fields.lyrics:
Hazard, la la la la la la,
Eden Hazard, la la la la la la.
fields.description: Melody chant for Belgian winger Eden Hazard.

fields.title: N'Golo Kante Chant
fields.lyrics:
N'Golo Kante, he sits in midfield,
N'Golo Kante, he plays for Chelsea.
fields.description: Terrace tribute to N'Golo Kante, midfield engine of two Premier League titles.

fields.title: Kante He Runs All Day
fields.lyrics:
Kante, Kante, N'Golo Kante,
He runs all day, he runs all day.
fields.description: Chant celebrating Kante's extraordinary stamina and ball-winning ability.

fields.title: Cole Palmer Chant
fields.lyrics:
Cole Palmer, he plays for Chelsea,
Cole Palmer, he scores the goals.
fields.description: Tribute to Cole Palmer, academy graduate and key figure in Chelsea's modern era.

fields.title: Cold Palmer
fields.lyrics:
Cold Palmer, Cold Palmer,
Cole Palmer, Cold Palmer.
fields.description: Playful nickname chant for Cole Palmer, a pun on his name and composure.

fields.title: Ashley Cole Chant
fields.lyrics:
Ashley Cole, Ashley Cole,
Ashley Cole, Ashley Cole.
fields.description: Chant for Ashley Cole, one of the greatest left-backs in Premier League history.

fields.title: Petr Cech Chant
fields.lyrics:
Petr Cech, la la la la la la la la la,
The best goalkeeper in the world.
fields.description: Goalkeeper chant for Petr Cech, Chelsea's legendary number one.

fields.title: Joe Cole Chant
fields.lyrics:
Joe Cole, Joe Cole, running down the wing,
Joe Cole, Joe Cole, running down the wing.
fields.description: Terrace song for winger Joe Cole during his Chelsea years.

fields.title: Claude Makelele
fields.lyrics:
Makelele, Makelele, Claude Makelele,
Makelele, Makelele, Claude Makelele.
fields.description: Tribute to Claude Makelele, whose holding role was so influential it was named after him.

fields.title: Michael Essien
fields.lyrics:
Michael Essien, he plays in midfield,
Michael Essien, he plays for Chelsea.
fields.description: Chant for Ghanaian midfielder Michael Essien, known as 'The Bison'.

fields.title: Thiago Silva Chant
fields.lyrics:
Thiago Silva, he plays at the back,
Thiago Silva, he plays for Chelsea.
fields.description: Chant for Brazilian centre-back Thiago Silva during his Chelsea spell.

fields.title: Mason Mount Chant
fields.lyrics:
Mason Mount, he wears the number ten,
Mason Mount, he plays for Chelsea.
fields.description: Tribute to academy graduate Mason Mount, key player in the 2021 Champions League win.

fields.title: Reece James Chant
fields.lyrics:
Reece James, he plays right-back,
Reece James, he plays for Chelsea.
fields.description: Chant for homegrown captain Reece James.

fields.title: Munich 2012 Chant
fields.lyrics:
Munich, Munich, we won it all in Munich,
Munich, Munich, we won it all in Munich.
fields.description: Chant celebrating Chelsea's first Champions League title, won in Munich in 2012.

fields.title: Kings of Europe 2012
fields.lyrics:
We're the kings of Europe, kings of Europe,
Chelsea FC, we're the kings of Europe.
fields.description: Celebration chant for Chelsea's 2012 Champions League triumph over Bayern Munich.

fields.title: Drogba Penalty Munich
fields.lyrics:
Drogba, Drogba, he scored in Munich,
Drogba, Drogba, he scored in Munich.
fields.description: Chant immortalising Didier Drogba's winning penalty in the 2012 Champions League final.

fields.title: Champions of Europe
fields.lyrics:
Champions of Europe, champions of Europe,
Chelsea FC, champions of Europe.
fields.description: General European celebration chant sung after 2012 and 2021 triumphs.

fields.title: Arsenal Taunt
fields.lyrics:
We hate Tottenham Hotspur, we hate Tottenham Hotspur,
We hate Tottenham Hotspur, but Arsenal are shite.
fields.description: Classic Chelsea rivalry chant mocking both North London clubs.

fields.title: Tottenham Taunt
fields.lyrics:
What a load of shite, what a load of shite,
Tottenham Hotspur, what a load of shite.
fields.description: Terrace taunt directed at Chelsea's North London rivals Tottenham Hotspur.

fields.title: Liverpool Taunt (2008)
fields.lyrics:
We won it twice at Anfield, we won it twice at Anfield,
Chelsea FC, we won it twice at Anfield.
fields.description: Banter chant referencing Chelsea's Champions League knockouts of Liverpool at Anfield.

fields.title: Roman Abramovich Song
fields.lyrics:
Roman Abramovich, he eats his lunch in a solid gold bath,
Roman Abramovich, he eats his lunch in a solid gold bath.
fields.description: Humorous terrace song about former owner Roman Abramovich during the trophy era.
